reviews.review_description: Honestly, it's boring and repetitive. Poor graphics  and gameplay. After the 6th or 7th ending i had enough feeling, like noting more interesting will happen and having to repeat the same steps again.

If you're used to escape rooms, you might think this is just another one of those.

It is not.

I've been playing for days, and I've only uncovered half the endings. That's because there are zero clues, and I refuse to get any kind of outside help. As a result, I spent many hours being stuck and memorizing every nook and cranny in hopes of figuring out the solution. That kind of experience is not for everyone, but it is very rewarding once things fall into place.

My only gripes are the not-so-great controls and the buggy height adjustment. Oftentimes I just want to move a single step, but the game forces me to teleport back and forth. It's silly. I also think every VR game should have a crouch button. Teleport grabs just aren't enough.

Other than that, it's a pretty good puzzle game for those patient enough to put up with it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the feedback! We're glad to hear you're having fun! If you encounter any other issues, please feel free to contact us at https://forwardxp.com/support/.

reviews.review_title: Best Game I Had Ever Played
reviews.review_description: There 30 endings. You have to find clues to find those endings. It can be a little confusing but if you like challenges like I do this is the game for you. Some endings have clues to help you find the next ending also each ending has a different scene or effect on your underground office . BTW you under a city that goes through different things..

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! We're glad you had a good time!

reviews.review_description:
Really fun game and kind of bone chilling! You really have to use your brain to solve the puzzles. I feel smart when I solve one.
:D

developer_response.body: We're glad to hear you had fun! Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_title: I'm Not Bright Enough It Seems...
reviews.review_description:
I thought I would try this since I love puzzle/ escape room games and own many of them, but either I am not at all mentality capable enough for this game or it has inherent design flaws that keep me from figuring out what I am supposed to do as with any other puzzle game I play (and figure out just fine after a bit).
This one, outside of getting a reaction for cleaning up the room, gave me nothing. Pressing the red button gave me a single audio cue, but nothing changed or happened afterwards. There was nothing else to mess with besides a water machine (nothing) and the dry erase board with mathematics I'm not even going to mess with if that is the puzzle in the first seconds of the game...
But nothing else at all to mess with to move on. 
So this puzzler, whether it's me or the drab core of the game's design, is not one I want to keep.
I wish I liked it (or was able to at least GET PAST THE FIRST FU**** "PUZZLE" OR EVEN FIGURE OUT WHAT OR WHERE THE PUZZLE EVEN IS!) like many others. I think this will be another refund though..
Difficult, fun, entertaining and rewarding, lots of demonic imagery though. So if you don't like that or just are not good at puzzles don't buy.

developer_response.body: We're so glad you had a good time! Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: I guess I'm just not getting it. I press a few buttons and the world blows up. Game over. Tried it 4 times, always the same outcome. Graphics are super low res, game lasts about 10 minutes.
How would I know to try some switch 20 times and then do X or press 6 times and do Y.  Very difficult game. No good clues. At least there is walkthroughs on the internet. Good luck, you will need it.

reviews.review_title: What are you supposed to do??
reviews.review_description:
I’ve played for idk how long and I’m so lost. I just see one ending over and over and over again. Why is only the button, typewriter, and Binders interactive? I can’t find anything to advance the story (if there is one). 

This game is far from easy and actually make no sense. I bought this game cause I was craving a good story but this game is actually nothing. There is nothing to do. Everything you think is interactive isn’t. I plan on Requesting a full refund.

One of the best vr games I've played in ages! It's really fun and challenging to find all the endings and secrets.

I would recommend it to anyone new to vr!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We appreciate your support and are glad you enjoy the game. :)

reviews.review_description: My family had gone through some pretty traumatic experiences due to Satanism (involved a suicide attempt also). We want nothing to do with this game that contains clearly satanic symbology.

I haven’t even finished the game and I feel like I’ve got my money’s worth. Sure, there are a few bugs here and there, but nothing that renders the game even slightly unplayable. The challenges aren’t too easy to find, nor too hard, and offer a very satisfying feel once you solve one of the 30 endings. All in all, not a perfect game, but one well deserving of 10 dollars

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback and review! We are glad you have enjoyed the game so far. :)

reviews.review_title: not worth it with a small space
reviews.review_description: normally games don’t need a big space but this requires a hole room but other than that it’s a good game

This is a crazy puzzle game.  I like the fact that it all takes place in this weird room where apparently you wield the power to commit mass destruction..even though you're only supposed to babysit and 'not touch anything'.   It has a nice relaxing snythy soundtrack and  makes you use your noggin.  

For those who have vertigo or prone to motion sickness on those action games that wildly spin or have you falling off a cliff, this game is totally not like that and  is totally for you. 

If its one thing i would change, is make more of the objects tangible...like the reel to reel machine or some of the drawers.
Best game ever

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the support! We are so glad you are enjoying the game. :)

reviews.review_description: Great puzzles, fun time to play alone or cast to screen and get others help.  If you like escape rooms or just thinking games, this one won't disappoint.  It is challenging sometimes and also can be a little frustrating as you are playing the game and learning how to use VR, but worth it.
It’s really good but I just find it a little confusing but overall it’s a 100/10. I would recommend to friends and family. I enjoy playing it.
